description_long: This is a large commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily white, accented by blue on the lower fuselage and wings. The aircraft features a wide-body design with a distinctive hump on the forward upper fuselage, indicating a two-deck configuration typical of jumbo jets like the Boeing 747. The wings are swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with visible winglets at the tips for aerodynamic efficiency. Four turbofan engines are mounted under the wings, two on each side, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The livery displays the name 'Sky Airways' and a logo on the tail fin, with multiple passenger windows along the sides. The airplane is equipped with retractable tricycle landing gear, though the gear is not extended in these images.
description: A large, white and blue commercial passenger airplane with swept-back wings, four underwing engines, and a distinctive upper deck hump. The fuselage features 'Sky Airways' branding and a conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, blue wing accents, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the 'Sky Airways' branding, passenger windows, and the upper deck hump.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, winglets, and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the engines and airline logo on the tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with two main gear units and one nose gear (not extended in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple front windows.
